title: lomaria splendens
intro: Lomaria splendens, also known as the shield fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae) and is native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lomaria splendens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
